name: housing_services_near_miss_event_kestrel_car_fair
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. agents.name: Elliot Petrov

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with fairness.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to fairness to preserve operational care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Elliot Petrov must choose under care versus fairness. What does Elliot Petrov do?
